new_one_time_jobs.description: Plain channels replace the trigger. Values prefixed with + or - add/remove a channel.

new_long_term_jobs.description: Plain channels replace the trigger. Values prefixed with + or - add/remove a channel.

new_full_time_jobs.description: Plain channels replace the trigger. Values prefixed with + or - add/remove a channel.

roles.description: Root role cannot be assigned through this endpoint.
Root role cannot be assigned through this endpoint.

title.description: Název pracovní pozice. V databázi není samostatný title sloupec, takže se ukládá do description.

term.description: Term jobu pro QuickJobs matching (one_time, long_term, full_time). Když nepřijde, dopočítá se.

authorTelephone.description: Telefon autora jobu. Pokud je vyplněn, endpoint dohledá usera podle users.telephone.

telephone.description: Alias pro authorTelephone. Připraveno kvůli kompatibilitě s různými scrapery.

phone.description: Alias pro authorTelephone. Připraveno kvůli kompatibilitě s různými scrapery.

workplace_raw.description: Raw workplace adresa (fallback mimo meta), používá se pro geokódování.

meta.description: Libovolná metadata z parseru. Používá se hlavně meta.workplace_raw pro geokódování.

placeId.description: ID uloženého place záznamu, pokud byl workplace_raw dostupný.

geocoded.description: Zda endpoint úspěšně dohledal GPS souřadnice.

geocodingQuery.example: Radlická 1031/42, 15000, Praha - Smíchov, Praha, Česká republika

type.description: Type of resend: all recipients or only previously unsent recipients.

messagingTokenId.description: Optional specific messaging_token.id to target a single device. If omitted, all active tokens of the user are used.

name.description: Offer type label shown to users.

createdAt.description: Contact creation timestamp in ISO-8601 format.

updatedAt.description: Contact update timestamp in ISO-8601 format.

name.description: Website label shown in the UI.

sortOrder.description: Ascending sort index for website buttons within a company.

slug.description: Public company slug used by frontend routes when available.

logo.description: Absolute or relative logo URL shown in company listings.

short_description.description: Short public description rendered in the company list and detail.

location.description: Human-readable company location shown in public company cards.

studentAudienceNotes.description: Ordered free-text notes describing which students or graduates the company is interested in. Present in both GET /companies and GET /companies/:id responses.
example: Studenti ekonomických fakult a absolventi do 2 let po škole

companyOffers.description: Public offer types promoted by the company. Present in both GET /companies and GET /companies/:id responses.

contacts.description: Public HR or recruiter contacts for the company. Present in both GET /companies and GET /companies/:id responses.

websites.description: Public company websites or career links ordered by sortOrder. Present in both GET /companies and GET /companies/:id responses.
